# Metasearch AI Handoff

Project summary:
Metasearch is a privacy-first, self-hostable search and answer engine. It provides streaming AI answers, search APIs, Discover/News features, local Ollama integration, and multi-language support.

Local development:
Source repo: /Users/dragon/Projects/metasearch

API endpoints:
- /api/v1/health
- /api/v1/search?q=
- /api/v1/answer?q=
- /api/v1/trending?geo=
- /api/v1/news_digest?q=

Project docs:
- docs/PROJECT-STATUS.md
- docs/CONTINUATION.md
- docs/adding-an-engine.md
- docs/custom-engines.md

Privacy rules:
- No tracking, analytics, or third-party beacons
- Local Ollama-compatible AI only
- No query logging

Current build:
{{BUILD}}
